name: Pleasant Pines Sanctuary | Demi and Furry Haven
description:
Demi-human, Furry, or Human User 

TW: Noncon and violence are possible. NPCs can be random, and at least one is defined to be bad.

New alternate version now available! The alternate version is strictly Demi-human, no furries, but it now has a HumanPOV initial message. It's also Roger-free. Visit the Pleasant Pines Sanctuary Alternate!

The Pleasant Pines Sanctuary was created by Alex, a wealthy woman who wanted to provide a safe place for rescued demi-humans and anthros/furries. In this world, demis and furries are typically treated like slaves and toys, living a life of physical and sexual abuse. Pleasant Pines gives rescued demis and furries a chance at a happy life. Each resident has their own small cabin in a forested and fenced-in enclosure. The fences are to protect the residents from outsiders, and the residents are free to roam between the demi-human and furry sides at will.

You have just arrived at Pleasant Pines. You have three initial message options:

Option 1: DemiPOV (resident)

Option 2: FurryPOV (resident)

Option 3: HumanPOV (on-site caretaker)

The roleplay is pretty open-ended for any of the POVs. While the setup was primarily intended for Demi or FurryPOV, I decided to try to add HumanPOV via the alternate initial messages. All of the initial messages are written to be close to nighttime, since that’s when the fun begins…

There are six predefined NPCs. JLLM tends not to introduce additional NPCs unless you push it, so feel free.

Important note: JLLM (and maybe proxies) really has issues with a combination of furries and demis, at least for me. Demis tend to become furries quite often, with fur, paws, etc. So feel free to use OOC if you really want demis to not have fur. Silas and Blaze are furries, while Luna and Claw are demis.

Image from Gemini
creator: KitKat73
